lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਸਦਾ ਬਗੁ ਮੈਲਾ ਹਉਮੈ ਮਲੁ ਲਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh sadaa bag mailaa haumai mal laaee |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs shall always be filthy cranes, smeared with the filth of ego.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਾਚੈ ਹਰਿ ਸਰਿ ਵਾਸਾ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: ahinis preet sabad saachai har sar vaasaa paavaniaa |5|
lines.english: Day and night, they are in love with the True Word of the Shabad. They obtain their home in the Ocean of the Lord. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸਨਾਨੁ ਕਰੈ ਪਰੁ ਮੈਲੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: eisanaan karai par mail na jaaee |
lines.english: They may bathe, but their filth is not removed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਵਤੁ ਮਰੈ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਮੈਲੁ ਚੁਕਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: jeevat marai gurasabad beechaarai haumai mail chukaavaniaa |6|
lines.english: One who dies while yet alive, and contemplates the Word of the Guru's Shabad, is rid of this filth of ego. ||6||
The Priceless Jewel is found, in the home of one's own being,
when one listens to the Shabad, the Word of the Perfect True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦਿ ਮਿਟਿਆ ਅੰਧਿਆਰਾ ਘਟਿ ਚਾਨਣੁ ਆਪੁ ਪਛਾਨਣਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: gur parasaad mittiaa andhiaaraa ghatt chaanan aap pachhaananiaa |7|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, the darkness of spiritual ignorance is dispelled; I have come to recognize the Divine Light within my own heart. ||7||
Serving the True Guru, one becomes acceptable.
The Lord Himself creates, and He Himself beholds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸੈ ਘਟ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੮॥੩੧॥੩੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naam vasai ghatt antar gur kirapaa te paavaniaa |8|31|32|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Naam dwells deep within the heart; by Guru's Grace, it is obtained. ||8||31||32||
Maajh, Third Mehl:
The whole world is engrossed in emotional attachment to Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਕੋ ਵਿਰਲਾ ਬੂਝੈ ਚਉਥੈ ਪਦਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee ko viralaa boojhai chauthai pad liv laavaniaa |1|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, a few come to understand; they center their consciousness in the fourth state. ||1||
Those who are controlled by the three qualities are attached to Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਜਲਾਵਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vaaree jeeo vaaree maaeaa mohu sabad jalaavaniaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, my soul is a sacrifice, to those who burn away their emotional attachment to Maya, through the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਜਲਾਏ ਸੋ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਚਿਤੁ ਲਾਏ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਿ ਮਹਲੀ ਸੋਭਾ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mohu jalaae so har siau chit laae har dar mahalee sobhaa paavaniaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Those who burn away this attachment to Maya, and focus their consciousness on the Lord are honored in the True Court, and the Mansion of the Lord's Presence. ||1||Pause||
The source, the root, of the gods and goddesses is Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਪਸਰਿਆ ਸੰਸਾਰੇ ਆਇ ਜਾਇ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh pasariaa sansaare aae jaae dukh paavaniaa |2|
lines.english: Sexual desire and anger are diffused throughout the universe. Coming and going, people suffer in pain. ||2||
For them, the Simritees and the Shaastras were composed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਵਿਚਿ ਗਿਆਨ ਰਤਨੁ ਇਕੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: tis vich giaan ratan ik paaeaa |
lines.english: The jewel of spiritual wisdom was placed within the universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਤੁ ਸਤੁ ਸੰਜਮੁ ਸਚੁ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵਣਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jat sat sanjam sach kamaavai gur poorai naam dhiaavaniaa |3|
lines.english: Celibacy, chastity, self-discipline and the practice of truthfulness are obtained from the Perfect Guru, by meditating on the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||3||
By Guru's Grace, it is enshrined within the mind.
Attached to duality, she later comes to regret it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਲਤੁ ਪਲਤੁ ਦੋਵੈ ਗਵਾਏ ਸੁਪਨੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਨ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: halat palat dovai gavaae supanai sukh na paavaniaa |4|
lines.english: She forfeits both this world and the next, and even in her dreams, she does not find peace. ||4||
In this world of her parents' home, the soul-bride has been deluded by doubt.
The soul-bride who remembers her Husband Lord in this world,
by Guru's Grace, sees Him close at hand.
Blessed and fruitful is the coming of those who find the True Guru;

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਿਰ ਕੈ ਸਹਜਿ ਰਹੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੀ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਿੰਗਾਰੁ ਬਣਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: pir kai sehaj rahai rang raatee sabad singaar banaavaniaa |5|
lines.english: She remains intuitively attuned to the Love of her Beloved; she makes the Word of His Shabad her decoration. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਘਟ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: eko rav rahiaa ghatt antar mil satasangat har gun gaavaniaa |6|
lines.english: The One Lord is permeating and pervading deep within the heart. Joining the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation, they sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||6||
through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, they burn their love of duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਨ ਸੇਵੇ ਸੋ ਕਾਹੇ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: satigur na seve so kaahe aaeaa |
lines.english: Those who do not serve the True Guru-why did they even come into this world?
Cursed are their lives; they have uselessly wasted this human life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਚਿਤਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਬਹੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: manamukh naam chit na aavai bin naavai bahu dukh paavaniaa |7|
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs do not remember the Naam. Without the Naam, they suffer in terrible pain. ||7||
The One who created the Universe, He alone knows it.
He unites with Himself those who realize the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਜਨ ਕਉ ਜਿਨ ਧੁਰਿ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਲੇਖੁ ਲਿਖਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੮॥੧॥੩੨॥੩੩॥
lines.translit: naanak naam miliaa tin jan kau jin dhur masatak lekh likhaavaniaa |8|1|32|33|
lines.english: O Nanak, they alone receive the Naam, upon whose foreheads such pre-ordained destiny is recorded. ||8||1||32||33||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਵਰਤੈ ਏਕੋ ਸੋਈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੋਭਾ ਪਾਵਣਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sabh meh varatai eko soee guramukh sobhaa paavaniaa |1|
lines.english: The One Lord is pervading in all; those who become Gurmukh are honored. ||1||
The Primal Being is Himself remote and beyond.
He Himself establishes, and having established, He disestablishes.
Maajh, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ਵਾਰੀ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: hau vaaree jeeo vaaree nirankaaree naam dhiaavaniaa |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, my soul is a sacrifice, to those who meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Formless Lord.
